analysis_summary: This document describes an online training event called 'Imersão NR-1: Riscos Psicossociais na Prática' focused on Brazilian labor regulation NR-1 regarding psychosocial risks. The key stakeholders identified for social opinion simulation include: (1) Instructors - 3 experts who lead the training; (2) Target audience - HR professionals, SST professionals, consultants, and organizational leaders seeking NR-1 compliance; (3) Companies - organizations required to implement psychosocial risk management; (4) Event organizers - the project creators managing the event; (5) Training platforms - digital infrastructure for delivery; (6) Regulatory bodies - government agencies overseeing NR-1 compliance. The simulation system should model how these entities interact during opinion formation, content discussion, and knowledge sharing about regulatory compliance topics.
